edits.description: Maintenance update, not a net-new page.
Tightens the restaurant cluster so parent and child workflow pages surface each other without generic off-topic links.
Keeps the voice practical and commercial: concrete workflow labels, no hype, no directory-style stuffing.
Improves discovery of the newer restaurant child pages from the stronger parent and voice-agent pages.
Bounded change focused on internal linking rather than expanding page count.
